SKILLS AND AGENTS - RECOMMENDED WEBSITES
==========================================

VS CODE COPILOT & EXTENSIONS
=============================
- VS Code Extension Marketplace
  https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/
  Official source for VS Code extensions, including Copilot-related tools

- GitHub Copilot Docs
  https://docs.github.com/en/copilot
  Official documentation for Copilot features and customization

- Cursor.sh
  https://www.cursor.sh/
  AI-first code editor with advanced agent capabilities


AI AGENTS & FRAMEWORKS
======================
- CrewAI Docs
  https://docs.crewai.com/
  Official CrewAI framework documentation (relevant to CREW/ workspace)

- LangChain Docs
  https://python.langchain.com/
  Popular framework for building LLM applications and agents

- AutoGen by Microsoft
  https://microsoft.github.io/autogen/
  Multi-agent conversation framework

- OpenAI Cookbook
  https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
  Practical examples and patterns for LLM applications


SKILL LIBRARIES & TOOLS
=======================
- Hugging Face Hub
  https://huggingface.co/
  Models, datasets, and community resources

- Semantic Kernel
  https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/semantic-kernel/overview/
  Microsoft's framework for integrating AI into apps

- Pydantic Docs
  https://docs.pydantic.dev/
  Essential for schema validation in CrewAI tools


LEARNING & COMMUNITY
====================
- GitHub Skills
  https://skills.github.com/
  Interactive learning paths

- Dev.to
  https://dev.to/
  Community-written articles on agents, automation, and development

- Towards Data Science (Medium)
  https://towardsdatascience.com/
  Deep dives into AI/ML topics
